_comment: Single source of truth for the accepted SWTools runtime artifact hashes. Current accepted package: releases/1.1.5/SWTools-1.1.5-Setup.exe, setup sha256 db63a8f430a3359049492fbc283caad19daceda3543fe12eb9dacb41d7342034. Both scripts/verify_release_package.ps1 and scripts/sw_test_preflight.ps1 load their default expected hashes from this file. Update here when the accepted build changes.
